## aurelian aws recon amplify-config

Extracts AWS Amplify configuration from a web application by scanning HTML and JavaScript bundles for Cognito, AppSync, API Gateway, S3, and other AWS service details.

```
aurelian aws recon amplify-config [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help         help for amplify-config
  -u, --url string   Amplify app URL to analyze (required)
  -v, --validate     Validate extracted API keys and probe endpoints for auth requirements
```
